articles.value: The Case for Why We Need More Monocolored Commander Decks
articles.excerpt: More monocolor precons, fewer five-color piles. Owain is hot on the case to see why we don't (but should) see more monocolor Commander precons.

articles.value: Don & Raph, Hard Science - Affinity for Artifacts on a Budget
articles.excerpt: Nothing busted ever happened with affinity for artifacts, right? Let's see if we can change that with Don & Raph, Hard Science on a budget.
